## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Checklist

- [ ] Branch is named with a prefix (`feature/`, `fix/`, `chore/`, `hotfix/`)
- [ ] `npm run check:fast` passes locally
- [ ] Included screenshots or API examples when behavior changed
- [ ] Added or updated docs for new env vars, jobs, or integration behavior
- [ ] No secrets or credentials were committed

## Risk Notes

Call out migration, auth, cron, or integration side effects here.
